system.description: This blank-slate Ripple looks like a goldfish in a bag of water. By spending one Quality Assurance from Subtlety or Empathy, you can create a quick full-sensory recording, up to five minutes in length, of a recent memory belonging to someone touching the bag. The Ripple will change appearance slightly to reflect the experience. Anyone can play back a full memory collected in the iPond by listening to headphones plugged into the Ripple. Recording a memory rewrites the previous one.
